case_title: DOWNER, COLLIE VS HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE MEDICAL CLINIC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DOWNER, COLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE MEDICAL CLINIC ALSON, JOSEPH DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
